headline: FNV Set to Gain From Cobre Panama Stockpile Processing Approval
summary: Franco-Nevada gains as Panama approves Cobre Panama stockpile processing, unlocking gold and silver output from pre-suspension ore.

headline: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From DuPont de Nemours's Report
summary: DuPont de Nemours is expected to announce its first-quarter results soon, and analysts are projecting a double-digit fall in its EPS.

raw.headline: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From DuPont de Nemours's Report

headline: A Look At DuPont De Nemours (DD) Valuation After New Water Treatment Product Launches
summary: DuPont de Nemours (DD) has expanded its water treatment portfolio with new FilmTec Fortilife reverse osmosis elements and Inge ultrafiltration modules, targeting higher efficiency, cost control, and more sustainable industrial water recovery. See our latest analysis for DuPont de Nemours. At a share price of $47.25, DuPont de Nemours has seen a 15.61% year to date share price return. Its 1 year total shareholder return of 89.10% and 3 year total shareholder return of 68.54% point to momentum...
